title: PvP Optimized Pack
description:
A Pvp Modpack for all pvp modes especially tiertest kits
(Trainingsmap is also in it)
body:
This modpack is designed for Minecraft PvP and includes everything you need to improve your performance.
It contains essential optimization mods, helpful utilities, and lightweight texture packs that make combat clearer and smoother.

**Features:**

-  Support for all PvP modes: crystal, mace, sword, SMP and more

-  PvP-friendly textures: low fire, low shield, clear UI elements

-  Built-in voice chat (optional on servers)

-  Useful utilities: Totem counter, hit indicators, better ping display, crosshair indicator


The ideal choice if you want to train, improve, and enjoy PvP in all modes.
